subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
topic_title: Speech Work: Intonation for Requests and Greetings
learning_objectives: Explain simple rising intonation in requests
Apply the patterns in spoken examples

sections.heading: Simple Polite Requests
sections.content: The note explains that requests take a rising intonation and gives examples such as 'May I see your passport please?' and 'Could I have a look at those pictures?'

sections.heading: Greetings
sections.content: The lesson also treats simple greetings that attract quick response, such as 'Good morning'.
